sourceTitle: VU-UvA task force on AI in education
evidenceSnippetOriginal: The UvA and VU draw up clear rules and guidelines on how students may use AI during teaching and assessment. We expect students to be transparent about how they have applied generative AI in their own learning and work.
rightsNote: Official university policy. Rights reserved by University of Amsterdam.
